summary: Comprehensive testing of College Management System completed - all core features working correctly for Principal, Teacher, and Student roles

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthorized access
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - both status codes indicate unauthorized access correctly

passed_tests: Principal dashboard loads with stats (1 Student, 1 Teacher, 7 Departments)
Teacher dashboard loads with assigned classes (4 BHMS classes)
Student dashboard loads with attendance, fees, and profile info
Navigation between Principal pages (Students, Teachers, Departments)
Demo credentials displayed properly on login page
No error messages found on any page
